summary: Applied Docker runtime container telemetry live for docker-runtime-lv3 and verified the container metrics in InfluxDB and the expanded Grafana detail dashboard.

verification.observed: docker-runtime-lv3 reported telegraf active with group membership 'telegraf docker'.

verification.check: Docker container metrics written to InfluxDB
verification.observed: InfluxDB returned docker_container_status, docker_container_cpu, docker_container_mem, docker_container_net, and docker_container_health rows for the uptime-kuma container on docker-runtime-lv3.

The LV3 docker-runtime-lv3 Detail dashboard was provisioned with 16 panels including Running Containers, Container CPU Usage, Container Memory Usage, Container Network Throughput, and Container Snapshot.

notes: The first live rerun exposed a handler-name mismatch in roles/monitoring_vm/tasks/main.yml; commit aad25fe fixed the notifications and the subsequent converge-monitoring run completed idempotently.
